LayoutObject.name: TemplateTextPortal Copy

Calculation.Text: Case(Length($$searchString)>1; PatternCount ( FAT Text @ Base Project Primary::Text; $$searchString); True )

StyledText.Data: Template texts - Primary and Secondary language <<Base Project::Name>> | Number of text chunks: {{FoundCount}} |
Template texts - Primary and Secondary language <<Base Project::Name>> | Number of text chunks: {{FoundCount}} |
Click the review progress buttons below to filter and view only transations that are: • Not reviewed yet • In progress • Approved

LayoutObject.name: TemplateTextPortal

Calculation.Text: Case(Length($$searchString)>1; PatternCount ( FAT Text @ Base Project Primary::Text; $$searchString); True )

StyledText.Data: Last modified by: <<FAT Text @ Base Project Primary::ModifiedBy>> • <<FAT Text @ Base Project Primary::ModificationTimeStamp>>
Last modified by: <<FAT Text @ Base Project Secondary::ModifiedBy>> • <<FAT Text @ Base Project Secondary::ModificationTimeStamp>>

Calculation.Text: "Describe where in the code this text is used."

StyledText.Data: The text created connected to this codebase will be duplicated when creating a new Title based on this code base. All texts must be in a Primary language (<<Language Primary @ Base Project::Language>> - encoded <<Language Primary @ Base Project::Localisation code>>) and a Secondary language (<<Language Secondary @ Base Project::Language>> - encoded <<Language Secondary @ Base Project::Localisation code>>). When creating a new template text, you must press the button Push text after text is entered to make all existing titles get a copy of this text, available as a global text in their original language. Enter where in the code the text is used in field Usage. This text will be visible for text editors and translators.
